nodes.label: types/widget.ts
nodes.summary: Central Zod schema definitions for all widget types and the AIResponse schema; exports TypeScript types inferred from schemas.

nodes.label: GravityParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema defining gravity simulation parameters: celestial bodies with mass, radius, color, position, and velocity vectors.

nodes.label: KanbanParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for kanban board columns containing tasks with id, title, and priority enum.

nodes.label: DashboardParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for dashboard widget with KPIs, chart configuration, and optional table data.

nodes.label: HtmlCanvasParamsSchema
nodes.summary: Zod schema for html-canvas widget carrying raw HTML/CSS/JS payload to render inside an iframe.

nodes.label: WidgetSchema
nodes.summary: Zod discriminated union of all widget type schemas keyed on the 'type' literal field.

nodes.label: AIResponseSchema
nodes.summary: Top-level Zod schema combining a widget payload with a text string, representing the full AI response structure.

nodes.label: ChatMessage
nodes.summary: TypeScript type extending chat messages with optional widget, createdAt, and toolInvocations fields for agent loop support.

edges.note: Defines WidgetSchema as discriminated union of all widget type schemas
Defines AIResponseSchema combining widget and text fields
ChatMessage type defined inline in types/widget.ts
WidgetSchema union includes gravity variant using GravityParamsSchema
AIResponseSchema.widget field is typed as WidgetSchema
ChatMessage.widget is typed as Widget (inferred from WidgetSchema)

hyperedges.relation: Together they form the AI structured output pipeline: types/widget.ts defines Zod schemas, lib/ai.ts provides the model, and generateObject enforces schema compliance on AI responses.
